title: The Night It All Began
overview: Jack and his friends rush to attend a momentous celebration, blissfully unaware of the looming revolt that threatens to turn his world upside down.

title: A Fateful Day
overview: After the attack, Jack wakes up in a hospital to find the city in ruins. He rushes home to find answers, but authorities suddenly pay him a visit.

title: An Unexpected Face
overview: One year later, the VC3 squad lands on the Moon to execute its mission. Meanwhile, the Moon Chains rebel forces begin a takeover of Copernicus City.

title: What Matters Most
overview: A devastating tragedy stirs memories of his grueling journey with the rest of the VC3 squad, reminding Jack of an important conversation with Eric.

title: Revelation
overview: The squad's next mission: capture a close ally of Bob Skylum before the Joint Army does. Jack has a shocking revelation after confronting the target.

title: Reunion
overview: As the squad struggles with the relentless attacks, Jack tries to wrap his mind around the fateful encounter. Can he trust Phil after all this time?

title: People of the Moon
overview: Windy infiltrates the Goddard Base. Meanwhile, with Mary as their guide, the squad learns how the Earth-Moon conflict has impacted the moon people.

title: Mary
overview: Phil recollects a dark memory when Dr. Salamandra arrives with urgent news. At Delambre Station, Mary shares her past with Jack when Rhys interrupts.

title: Unchanging Feelings
overview: Inanna falls mysteriously ill, and while Mary knows someone who can cure her, they're in the opposite direction. Will the squad make the detour?

title: Pursuit
overview: The squad finally arrives at Agarum City but faces a blockade. Hoping to reduce the number of casualties, Jack takes matters into his own hands.

title: Unknown
overview: Dr. Salamandra abandons her fight with Jack to stop a rampaging L-Zone. They struggle to subdue the entity — until Mary suddenly appears.

title: Falling Shadows
overview: As the rogue L-Zone advances toward Agarum City, the squad grapples with the discovery of Mary's mysterious quality. Later, the base is compromised.

title: Parting
overview: While the battle between the rebel forces and the Joint Army rages on, Jack faces Rhys in a painful confrontation. Mary makes a desperate request of him.

title: The Past and Reality
overview: Thirteen years ago, Rhys meets Jack for the first time. In the present, the VC3 squad plunges into a fierce battle zone to reach their target.

title: Expectations
overview: Time is running out for Rhys and her team, but an unforeseen reunion disrupts their mission. Later, Mary and Jack reflect on everything that's happened.

title: Reminiscence
overview: Phil recounts the day he learned the truth about everything and shares shocking information about Jack's true purpose. Dr. Salamandra interrogates Rhys.

title: Domination
overview: While the L-Zone surrounds Copernicus City, Zowan and Duan free Rhys. In a clash with rebel forces, Inanna and the squad face a tough decision.

title: Carry On Your Will
overview: Following a deadly scuffle, the L-Zone begins to act up and absorbs Mary in the chaos. Can Phil and Jack save her and the Moon before it's too late?
